description_long: This is a large, modern residential house with a flat roof and a rectangular footprint, featuring multiple rooms and open-plan living spaces. The exterior is characterized by a mix of brick and white wall finishes, with large windows arranged in horizontal bands. The house includes landscaped outdoor areas with trees, shrubs, and a patio, as well as a spacious driveway and garage area. The interior layout is visible, showing various furnished rooms, communal spaces, and hallways. The property is surrounded by a low wall and includes recreational amenities such as a tennis or basketball court. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, open spaces, and integration with outdoor landscaping.
description: A modern, flat-roofed house with brick and white exterior, large windows, landscaped gardens, and visible interior rooms. Features include a driveway, garage, and recreational court.
description_view_0: Front view shows the main entrance, landscaped garden, and a clear view of the open-plan interior layout.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the driveway, garage, and recreational court, with a partial view of the interior rooms.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the backyard, patio area, and additional landscaping, with the house's flat roof and window bands visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view reveals more of the garden, outdoor seating, and the arrangement of rooms along the house's length.
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a wide door, small steps, and a landscaped approach, lacking ornate columns or overhangs.
